title: How to Create a Client Pitch With AI — From Prompt to PDF in 15 Minutes
summary: This video demonstrates Venngage AI's one-pager generator, which automates the creation of client-ready marketing documents from a single prompt. The workflow covers content generation, design, editing, visual selection, and PDF export in approximately 15 minutes.
writeup: The video walks through Venngage AI's one-pager generator, which builds a client-ready marketing document from a single prompt. The full workflow covers content generation, design, editing, visual selection, and PDF export in roughly 15 minutes. It shows how prompt-to-PDF automation collapses the steps of producing a client pitch into one tool.
